description_long: This lamp features a rectangular wooden frame with a slightly protruding top and base, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The front and back panels are divided into four sections by vertical and horizontal wooden bars, with translucent amber-colored panes that likely diffuse the light. One side of the lamp is completely solid wood, while the other side mirrors this design, suggesting a symmetrical structure. The back panel shows a darkened, possibly damaged or unlit section in the upper left quadrant, adding visual interest or indicating wear. The wood grain is visible throughout, lending a natural and rustic aesthetic suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The lamp is designed to be both functional and decorative, with clean lines and a robust build.
description: A rectangular wooden lamp with amber paneled sections and a sturdy, classic design, featuring visible wood grain and divided light panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows four amber panels divided by wooden bars within a rectangular wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a solid wooden surface with no visible panels or openings.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front but with a darkened or damaged upper left panel, suggesting wear or an unlit section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, showing a solid wooden surface.
